source_pr.title: executor: migrate test-infra to testify for executor_test.go testSuiteP1

root_cause_explanation: This PR migrates `executor/executor_test` (testSuiteP1) from legacy gocheck-style suites to testify/require. Test-framework migration / suite refactor can stabilize suite lifecycle and reduce flaky behavior introduced by deprecated test frameworks.
fix_pattern: Migrate legacy gocheck-based executor tests to testify (modern Go `testing.T` patterns), updating suite setup/teardown and assertions.

evidence: evidence: + // test race | tk.MustQuery("select 1 order by 1;").Check(testkit.Rows("1")) (executor/executor_test.go)
